The '''Galactic Alliance Defense Fleet''', also known as the '''Galactic Alliance Navy''' or simply the '''Alliance fleet''', was the [[Navy/Legends|naval service branch]] of the [[Galactic Alliance Defense Force]]. It replaced the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]] as a result of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] reorganization as the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].

==History==
The [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] [[Galactic Alliance Defense Force|Defense]] [[Fleet/Legends|Fleet]] originated from the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]].<ref name="TFP" /> During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] was reformed into the [[Galaxy/Legends|Galactic]] Alliance.<ref name="Destiny's Way">''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]''</ref> The new [[Politics/Legends|government]] absorbed its predecessor's forces and continued to fight the [[Yuuzhan Vong]],<ref name="TFP" /> whose [[Yuuzhan Vong empire|empire]] collapsed by the end of [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]]-wide war.<ref name="Unifying">''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''</ref>

[[File:Scythe-class.jpg|left|thumb|A ''Scythe''-class [[Battlecruiser/Legends|battle cruiser]] engaging a [[Pellaeon-class Star Destroyer|''Pellaeon''-class Star Destroyer]].]]
All the senior commanders survived the battle: Sovv subsequently reappeared at [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]], while Kre'fey regrouped at [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]], Bel Iblis organized a defensive posture around the major shipyards at [[Fondor/Legends|Fondor]] and [[Tallaan]] in [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]], and Antilles moved first to [[Borleias/Legends|Borleias]] and then [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat]]. Of course, in the aftermath of the tactical and strategic rout of the Defense Force and the collapse of the Galactic government, the forces which had attached themselves to each commander bore little relationship to the former order of battle, but by [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]], the old Fleet designations were once more being applied to the forces under their command.

At this time, the old designation of the [[Fourth Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Fourth Fleet]] was also revived, although it is unclear how much of the old Fourth Fleet had survived to be regrouped into what was now essentially the front-line fighting force of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] under its [[Supreme Commander (Galactic Empire)/Legends|Supreme Fleet Commander]], [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]].
Elements of these four fleets were heavily involved in the [[Defense of Mon Calamari (Yuuzhan Vong War)|defense]] of Mon Calamari and the [[Battle of Yuuzhan'tar|reconquest]] of Coruscant. The fate of the old [[New Republic Fifth Fleet|Fifth Fleet]] is unclear: it had been guarding [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]] in the last years of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], and the designation is not heard of again until the time of the [[Swarm War]], by which time it was commanded by the young Bothan [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Nek Bwua'tu]]. The Fifth Fleet had evidently undergone some reorganization in the interim, as the fleet flagship was the post-war [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Admiral Ackbar (Victory-class)|''Admiral Ackbar'']], and the [[Mon Mothma (Imperial-class)|''Mon Mothma'']], former flagship of the [[Third Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Third Fleet]], had been assigned as the command ship of a subordinate [[Task force/Legends|task force]] commanded by [[Commodore/Legends|Commodore]] [[Gavin Darklighter]].

The Alliance's shipbuilding machine had been pushed into overdrive at the peak of the Yuuzhan Vong War, and thus by the time of the Swarm War the Defense Fleet had swollen to Nine Fleets. Sien Sovv administered an enormous reorganization of the Defense Force, which involved the construction of [[General Crix Madine Military Reserve]] in the [[Coruscant system/Legends|Coruscant system]].
